uin_code.source_quote: IRDA Reg. No. 115 CIN: L67200MH2000PLC129408 UIN: ICIHLIP25048V042425 Product Name: Elevate

min_entry_age.source_quote: Dependent Child means a child (natural or legally adopted), who is unmarried, aged between 91 days and 30 years

max_entry_age.source_quote: No explicit max adult entry age cap in wordings; adult entry 18+ years (Elevate is positioned as no-cap entry policy)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured options per Policy Schedule (Elevate plans: 5L / 7.5L / 10L / 15L / 25L / 50L / 1Cr / 3Cr and 'Unlimited Sum Insured' option mentioned in benefit conditions)

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 1. Pre-Existing Diseases - Code- Excl01 ... expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specific Waiting Period - Code- Excl02 ... be excluded until the expiry of 24 months

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Add Ons/Optional Cover - Maternity Benefit shall be reduced from 24 months to 12 months (default 24 months under optional Maternity Benefit)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred in respect of the Insured Person immediately 90 days before the Insured Person's Admission to Hospital

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post-Hospitalization Medical Expenses ... immediately 180 days following the Insured Person's discharge from Hospital

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Kindly refer the list of day care treatments / procedures: https://www.icicilombard.com/health-insurance/ (no fixed count in wording body)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: Day Care Centre includes an AYUSH Day Care Centre ... AYUSH Day Care Centre means and includes ... (In-patient AYUSH Hospitalization covered)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Add Ons/Optional Cover - Maternity Benefit (Maternity is opt-in optional, not base)

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Newborn baby (and) post-natal (up to 30 days from date of [birth]) (covered only if optional Maternity Benefit is opted)

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: We have accepted a claim under Section 'Inpatient treatment' in respect of the Insured Person. (Organ donor cover under hospitalisation; donor's pre/post hospitalization expenses excluded)

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: 10. Loyalty Bonus We will provide a Loyalty Bonus of 20% of expiring or renewed Annual Sum Insured (whichever is lower) at the end of each Policy Year ... not be accumulated for more than 100%

restoration_benefit.value: Reset Benefit: up to 100% Annual Sum Insured, unlimited triggers per policy year
restoration_benefit.source_quote: 11. Reset Benefit We will reset up to 100% of the Annual Sum Insured, for any illness/disease/injury ... triggered unlimited times for any illness/disease/injury.

room_rent_capping.value: Single Private AC Room (no daily cap on base benefit; proportionate deduction if higher category opted)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: i. Room Rent charges up to Single Private AC ... proportionate share of the total Associated medical expenses

copayment_pct.source_quote: No mandatory base copayment in Elevate (voluntary copay available per Policy Schedule)

deductible_amount.source_quote: No base deductible (optional Voluntary Deductible add-on available)

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric; ICICI Lombard advertises 7,500+ network hospitals on its website

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility means a facility extended by the [insurer to the insured] (defined)

claim_settlement_ratio.source_quote: Insurer-level metric (IRDAI Annual Report); not extracted

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT governed by IRDAI Master Circular

policy_type.source_quote: In-patient Treatment ... up to the Annual Sum Insured (indemnity-based premium tier)

_meta.notes: Elevate is ICICI Lombard's premium-tier policy with Inflation Protector, Power Booster, Unlimited Reset, optional Maternity. Loyalty Bonus 20% (max 100%).
